title: FabricationMachineProfileInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime JSON payloads for machine capability/profile workers that report printer, mill, lathe, router, sheet-cutter, postprocess, and inspection capabilities, calibration, tools, fixtures, material/process state, maintenance blockers, and release evidence.

FabricationMachineProfileScope.title: FabricationMachineProfileScope
FabricationMachineProfileScope.description: One requested profile or evidence scope for a machine or process class.

machineId.description: Specific machine id to profile when known.

machineClass.description: Machine or station class such as additive-fdm, additive-resin, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, laser, waterjet, plasma, postprocess-station, inspection, or assembly.

scopeKind.description: Scope kind such as capability, calibration, tool-library, fixture-library, material-state, process-state, maintenance, controller, network, safety, or release-evidence.

requestedEvidence.description: Evidence labels requested for this scope.

FabricationMachineCapabilitySnapshot.title: FabricationMachineCapabilitySnapshot
FabricationMachineCapabilitySnapshot.description: Current machine capability snapshot usable by design, instruction generation, simulation, assembly planning, and release gates.

machineClass.description: Machine or station class such as additive-fdm, additive-resin, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, laser, waterjet, plasma, postprocess-station, inspection, or assembly.

controller.description: Controller, firmware, postprocessor, or machine-control stack.

profileStatus.description: Profile status such as current, stale, blocked, maintenance, calibration-required, offline, or review-required.

axisLimits.description: Axis, build-volume, travel, chuck, rotary, sheet, stock, or fixture limits.

processCapabilities.description: Supported processes, materials, controllers, postprocessors, cutting modes, layer processes, support media, or inspection modes.

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence required before this machine can be used for machine-ready release.

FabricationMachineCalibrationState.title: FabricationMachineCalibrationState
FabricationMachineCalibrationState.description: Calibration, datum, probe, tool-length, extrusion, beam, pump, or inspection state for a machine.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with this calibration state.

calibrationKind.description: Calibration kind such as bed-level, nozzle-offset, extrusion-steps, tool-length-offset, work-offset, probe-routine, spindle-runout, backlash, rotary-axis, beam-focus, pump-pressure, abrasive-flow, or inspection-probe.

status.description: Status such as current, stale, missing, failed, pending, waived, or human-review-required.

measuredAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this state was measured.

expiresAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this calibration evidence expires.

metrics.description: Compact metric labels or key=value strings.

evidence.description: Evidence labels emitted by this calibration state.

FabricationMachineToolState.title: FabricationMachineToolState
FabricationMachineToolState.description: Tool, nozzle, extruder, cutter, insert, magazine, turret, beam, jet, or inspection probe readiness.

toolId.description: Stable tool, nozzle, extruder, cutter, turret station, or probe id.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with this tool state.

toolKind.description: Tool kind such as nozzle, extruder, endmill, drill, tap, turning-insert, partoff-blade, laser-head, waterjet-nozzle, plasma-torch, abrasive-feed, probe, or inspection-sensor.

status.description: Status such as ready, loaded, missing, worn, broken, stale-offset, needs-operator-load, blocked, or human-review-required.

station.description: Magazine, turret, spindle, extruder, head, or station label when applicable.

materials.description: Materials or stock this tool is suitable for.

evidence.description: Evidence labels attached to this tool state.

FabricationMachineFixtureState.title: FabricationMachineFixtureState
FabricationMachineFixtureState.description: Fixture, vise, chuck, pallet, build plate, slat bed, tailstock, catcher, subspindle, vacuum, clamp, or support-media readiness.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with this fixture state.

fixtureKind.description: Fixture kind such as print-bed, vise, pallet, chuck, collet, tailstock, subspindle, part-catcher, vacuum-bed, clamp-kit, slat-table, water-table, support-media, or inspection-nest.

status.description: Status such as ready, loaded, missing, stale, blocked, operator-proof-required, or human-review-required.

partIds.description: Part or operation ids this fixture state is tied to.

evidence.description: Evidence labels attached to this fixture state.

FabricationMachineMaterialState.title: FabricationMachineMaterialState
FabricationMachineMaterialState.description: Material, stock, filament, resin, powder, sheet, coolant, gas, abrasive, water, or postprocess media readiness.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with this material state.

materialKind.description: Material state kind such as filament, resin, powder, billet, bar-stock, sheet-stock, coolant, assist-gas, abrasive, water-table, adhesive, solvent, or inspection-consumable.

status.description: Status such as ready, loaded, conditioned, stale, missing, contaminated, low, blocked, or human-review-required.

metrics.description: Compact metric labels such as moisture=ok, pressurePsi=55000, coolantConcentration=8pct, sheetThicknessMm=3.0, or lot=ABC.

evidence.description: Evidence labels attached to this material state.

FabricationMachineProfileBlocker.title: FabricationMachineProfileBlocker
FabricationMachineProfileBlocker.description: Machine-profile blocker that prevents or constrains use of a machine, tool, fixture, calibration, material, or process state.

code.description: Stable blocker code such as calibration-expired, fixture-proof-required, tool-offset-stale, material-conditioning-required, maintenance-lockout, support-media-required, operator-load-required, or profile-stale.

message.description: Human-readable blocker summary safe for logs.

severity.description: Severity such as blocker, high, medium, low, warning, or info.

machineReadyImpact.description: Effect on release posture such as blocks-machine-ready, needs-operator-review, warning-only, profile-only, or learning-only.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with the blocker when known.

evidenceRequired.description: Evidence labels required to clear this blocker.

FabricationMachineProfileRequest.title: FabricationMachineProfileRequest
FabricationMachineProfileRequest.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.machine.profiles.requests for machine profile workers.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Producers should emit dd.fabrication.machine-profile.request.v1.

requestId.description: Unique id for this machine-profile job, suitable for dedupe and result correlation.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id that needs current machine evidence.

jobId.description: Optional fabrication job id when the planner has already persisted one.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the planner published this request.

producer.description: Producer service instance or deployment name.

resultSubject.description: Subject workers should publish the result to; defaults to dd.remote.fabrication.machine.profiles.results.

preferredMachineIds.description: Machines preferred by the planner or operator.

requiredMachineClasses.description: Machine classes required for this planning job.

knownEvidence.description: Evidence labels the planner already has before profile refresh.

priority.description: Optional scheduling hint. Higher values mean more urgent machine profile work.

FabricationMachineProfileResult.title: FabricationMachineProfileResult
FabricationMachineProfileResult.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.machine.profiles.results with current machine capabilities, calibration, tool/fixture/material state, blockers, and release evidence.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Workers should emit dd.fabrication.machine-profile.result.v1.

requestId.description: Machine-profile request id this result answers.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id from the original request.

jobId.description: Optional persisted fabrication job id from the original request.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the worker published this result.

workerId.description: Worker id, pod name, or adapter instance that produced this result.

profiler.description: Machine-profile adapter, inventory source, controller bridge, or operator system used.

profilerVersion.description: Profiler or adapter version used for repeatability and audit.

success.description: True when the worker completed the requested profile refresh.

machineReady.description: True only when returned machine states have no retained blockers for the requested scope.

calibrations.description: Calibration states returned by the worker.

tools.description: Tool states returned by the worker.

fixtures.description: Fixture and support states returned by the worker.

materials.description: Material and process media states returned by the worker.

reviewMetadata.description: Free-form non-secret metadata such as inventory snapshot ids, controller poll times, operator-review notes, or profile confidence.
